title: The axe of Santos
description: A basic resource package that allows you to change the appearance of axes.
body:
This resource pack was created based on the MineShield server (Season 3)

## For correct work you need Optifine or [CITResewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)
Rename your golden axe to "**Santos**" so that it becomes the golden axe of Santos.

### here it is (down arrow)
![in the game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d04e472518112b8ca6c0ee1049043c4cc985111.png)

> Subscribe to my [telegram channel](https://t.me/olarcyzm), you can also contact me there
